title: Gauntlet Cursor
description: Replace your cursor with a cool gauntlet sprite!
body:
## **OVERVIEW**

This resource pack is made for the [Cursors Extended](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-cursor) mod. It changes the cursor to look like the ones from old videogames.

## **WHAT DOES THIS ADD?**
This resource pack adds new cursor sprites that make your modded cursor fit in better with a medieval styled modpack.

### **HOW TO USE**
To use this pack you first need to install the prebiously mentioned Cursors Extended mod and then enable the resource pack.

# ENJOY!
